title: Store Staff/Supervisor blocked from warehouse_stock API
description: SCM_INVENTORY_ROLES does not include Store Staff or Store Supervisor. The useWarehouseStock hook returns 403 for store-level users, making the entire inventory dashboard show 'Could not load inventory' error.

title: LastOrderPanel overlay blocks clicks after opening — no Escape key handler
description: After opening the Last Order panel, pressing Escape does not close it. The overlay remains and blocks pointer events on tabs. Backdrop onClick works but only if clicking the semi-transparent area.

title: get_store_order_history returns 'Unknown action' — Frappe backend not rebuilt
description: Order history API merged in PR #353 but Frappe Docker container not rebuilt. Frontend correctly routes the action. Requires Docker rebuild to deploy.

title: test.auditor@bebang.ph cannot login to /dashboard
description: External Auditor role does not redirect to /dashboard after login. Not a bug — auditors have different landing page.
